title: Brotein
html:
Brotein

First mentioned in 2025 05 30 todos (recurring across mid-2025).

A separate Yahir project — fitness/protein-focused app. Outgrowth of BroMenu (the original anabolic scoring menu-scanner spec from 2024 12 21 todos). Distinct from Rankett and the category. Recurring work areas in his 2025 todos:

  • Codes implementation (some kind of code/scanner system)
  • Menu parallel scanning (image-based menu parsing?)
  • Leaderboard feature (gamification)
  • Group share feature (social layer)
  • TikTok slideshow content (marketing)
  • Brotein "werun" group (fitness/community angle)
  • Supabase uploads — backend stack
  • "Brotein to Market" goal mentioned 6/30/2025 — appears to have been a launch milestone

Open questions

  • What does Brotein actually do? Fitness tracking? Protein/menu scanning? A community for runners/lifters?
  • Is it still active in 2026 or did it get sunsetted in favor of Rankett?
  • Relationship to the — is Brotein one of them, or separate?

Related

  • rankett
  • bromenu
  • anabolic scoring
  • supabase
  • openai api
  • swiftui
  • 2025 05 30 todos
  • 2024 12 21 todos
  • 2025 07 09 screenshot 2025 07 09 at 4 51 29 pm 720cb8bf — Supabase menu_items table
  • 2025 07 17 screenshot 2025 07 17 at 9 13 52 pm bb1a5662 — Chipotle nutrition seed

Synthesized in

  • 2026-04-27 — brotein as rankett prototype (cited in synthesis)
